pi_items.source: Could not verify because verifier.py is entirely missing from the environment.
export_result.sh writes the evaluation result to this path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real SARS-CoV-2 spike glycoprotein data (PDB ID: 6VXX) fetched from the RCSB. By independently analyzing the 6VXX structure data from RCSB, it was confirmed that there are exactly 63 total unique NAG (N-acetyl-D-glucosamine) residues in the complex, with exactly 11 on Chain A and 11 on Chain B. The agent is expected to save the rendered figure to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/glycan_shield.png and the text report to /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/glycan_report.txt. However, it was discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task programmatically unscorable.
